homepage.title: Fristads Workwear | Dressed for a sustainable performance
homepage.description: Fristads offers functional and durable workwear for all industries.Our mission is to equip you for every possible challenge ahead. We're in this together.

Works everywhere
This spring, we leave the worksite for a while and let the unexpected lead the way. We switch to lighter gear with flexibility where you need it and visibility where it counts. Built for performance on site, ready for life beyond.
Explore the news >
Customize your trousers.
Carpenter, electrician or allrounder? No problem. With Fristads Flex you build your trousers your way – thanks to smart detachable pockets.
Go to >
WEATHER? WHATEVER.
Our jackets are all about weathering the season with gear that keeps you warm and dry, no matter what the weather throws at you.
Go to >
The missing piece
Coming soon
See more >
Explore your nature
Fristads Outdoor is made of recycled and organic materials.
Go to >
Green Calculator
Now you can calculate the environmental impact of your workwear.
Go to >
News
The latest workwear from Fristads takes comfort at work to new levels.
Go to >

Home
What we do
About us
We make premium workwear for professional users.
Workwear is – and always has been – the heart and soul of our business. From the warehouse floor and grocery store to the welding shop and construction site, our premium workwear keeps people safe and comfortable at all times.
We make premium workwear for professional users.
Workwear is – and always has been – the heart and soul of our business. From the warehouse floor and grocery store to the welding shop and construction site, our premium workwear keeps people safe and comfortable at all times.
Tradition of innovation.
OUR HISTORY.
In 1925, Fristads’ founder John Magnuson started manufacturing workwear in the village of Fristad just outside Borås, Sweden. Read more about our story here.
READ MORE  >
Tradition of innovation.
OUR HISTORY.​​​​​​​
In 1925, Fristads’ founder John Magnuson started manufacturing workwear in the village of Fristad just outside Borås, Sweden. Read more about our story here.
READ MORE >
A great place to perform.
WORK WITH US.
Working for Fristads means that you are part of a market-leading company, driving the development within sustainability in our industry.
Read more >
A great place to perform.
WORK WITH US.​​​​​​​
Working for Fristads means that you are part of a market-leading company, driving the development within sustainability in our industry.
READ MORE >
Every professional dressed for sustainable performance.
OUR VISION.
We believe that every professional deserves durable clothes that fit comfortably and protect the user from the minute they show up for work until they are done for the day. We believe that great workwear should protect the wearer, but never at unnecessary expense of the environment.
Every professional dressed for sustainable performance.
OUR VISION.​​​​​​​
We believe that every professional deserves durable clothes that fit comfortably and protect the user from the minute they show up for work until they are done for the day. We believe that great workwear should protect the wearer, but never at unnecessary expense of the environment.
Changing the world of workwear.
sustainability.
We are committed to minimising the negative impact of our business operations and have set an ambitious goal to cut our emissions of greenhouse gases by 50% by 2030.
Read more >
We want to help our users do better.
sustainability.​​​​​​​
When our workwear performs, so do our users. We are passionate about our products, our company and our customers. We challenge ourselves and each other to grow and improve. Together, we safeguard the environment for the present generations and those to come.
​​​​​​​
READ MORE >
We want to help our users do better.
OUR PROMISE.
When our workwear performs, so do our users. We are passionate about our products, our company and our customers. We challenge ourselves and each other to grow and improve. Together, we safeguard the environment for the present generations and those to come.
We want to help our users do better.
OUR PROMISE.​​​​​​​
When our workwear performs, so do our users. We are passionate about our products, our company and our customers. We challenge ourselves and each other to grow and improve. Together, we safeguard the environment for the present generations and those to come.
Passionate performance, together we keep it simple.
OUR CORE VALUES.
Everything we do is based on our core values, Passion, Performance, Simplicity and Togetherness. We are passionate about our products, and we seek excellence in everything
